who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, billing denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate follow-up reminders instead of manual tracking and follow-up via spreadsheets or paper notes.
problem: Tracking and managing medical billing denials effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Participate in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of denial reasons and dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for follow-ups
Allow CSV import for existing denial data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Streamline steps in user onboarding process
